items.title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain
items.summary: The leaders of the world's two superpowers were all smiles for the cameras during the US president's visit to Beijing.

items.title: 'Floating armoury' ship reportedly seized by Iran
items.summary: A vessel said to be a “floating armoury” in the Gulf of Oman has been seized by Iranian military personnel, according to reports.

items.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble of Kyiv flats after massive Russian strikes
items.summary: Two children are among at least 12 killed in Ukraine's capital in massive Russian drone and missile attacks, officials say.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普：中國同意訂購200架波音飛機
items.summary: 美國總統川普（Donald Trump）今天接受福斯新聞頻道（Fox News）專訪時表示，中國同意向美國飛機製造商波音（Boeing）購買200架飛機。  川普目前人在北京進行訪問。他在接...…

items.title: 川普稱習近平願助開放荷莫茲海峽　承諾不武裝伊朗
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天表示，中國國家主席習近平已提議由中國協助開放荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz），並承諾不會運送軍事裝備援助伊朗對抗美國與以色列的戰爭。  法新社報導，美中領袖於北...…

items.title: 在阿曼灣遭伊朗劫持船隻身分曝 是艘「海上軍火庫」
items.summary: 英國海事貿易行動中心（UKMTO）說，一艘船在阿曼灣遭劫持，「正駛往伊朗領海」。英國海事安全公司Vanguard則指出，這艘船是「海上軍火庫」，被伊朗軍方扣走。  Vangu...…
